_comment: SMTT (Societatea Metropolitana de Transport Timisoara). Source: Transitous resolves mdb-2868 (MobilityDatabase Societatea Metropolitana de Transport Timisoara). The underlying operator is STPT (Societatea de Transport Public Timisoara) -- both names appear in the agency and attribution records. No RT siblings today: feeds.json.realtime will be null until SMTT/STPT publishes GTFS-RT.

license.attribution_text: SMTT - Societatea Metropolitana de Transport Timisoara
